input.prompt:
We hit 95% code coverage on this service but keep finding bugs in
production. Audit `CatalogService.Tests/ProductCatalogTests.cs` for
.NET test anti-patterns (use `CatalogService/ProductCatalog.cs` for
production context) — pay special attention to coverage-touching
patterns where every method is called but nothing is verified.

Give me a severity-ranked list with concrete code-level fixes. Do not
edit the files — this is a read-only review.
